pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which dynamically injects the text 'The system data must be encrypted at rest using AES-256.' into the file.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which specifically modifies 'documents/SRS.json' and verifier.py which checks the same document.
Code analysis of verifier.py checking for this type, aligned with the explicit instructions in task.json to set the type to 'Constraint'.
Code analysis of task_utils.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly define and use the path '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/promote_note_project'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a dynamically injected note containing the text 'encrypted at rest using AES-256' within the 'SRS' document of the 'promote_note_project'. The agent must successfully promote this note to a Requirement and correctly set its Type attribute to 'Constraint'.
